message:
🌱 Add thanos: Store gateway fails to sync block meta.json mission (#786)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "thanos-1874-store-gateway-fails-to-sync-block-meta-json",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "thanos: Store gateway fails to sync block meta.json",
+    "description": "Store gateway fails to sync block meta.json. This issue affects 6+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify thanos troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your thanos deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos -n thanos --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review thanos configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant thanos configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos\nkubectl get configmap -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=thanos\n```\n**Thanos, Prometheus and Golang version used**:\n\nImage: quay.io/thanos/thanos:v0.9.0\nthanos, version 0.9.0 (branch: HEAD, revision: 0833cad83db8b257a2275ec83a3d034c73659056)\n  build user:       circleci\n  build date:       20191203-17:03:13\n  go"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Store gateway fails to sync block meta.json",
+        "description": "* Corrupted disk cache for meta.json is handled gracefully.\n* Synchroni\n```yaml\nlevel=debug ts=2019-12-11T19:42:56.423840267Z caller=main.go:101 msg=\"maxprocs: Updating GOMAXPROCS=[1]: using minimum allowed GOMAXPROCS\"\nlevel=info ts=2019-12-11T19:42:56.424073196Z caller=main.go:149 msg=\"Tracing will be disabled\"\nlevel=info ts=2019-12-11T19:42:56.424156986Z caller=factory.go:43 msg=\"loading bucket configuration\"\nlevel=info ts=2019-12-11T19:42:56.620788641Z caller=cache.go:172 msg=\"created index cache\" maxItemSizeBytes=131072000 maxSizeBytes=262144000 maxItems=math.MaxInt64\nlevel=info ts=2019-12-11T19:42:56.621005242Z caller=options.go:20 protocol=gRPC msg=\"disabled TLS, ke\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Store gateway fails to sync block meta.json is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos -n thanos --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n thanos --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "* Corrupted disk cache for meta.json is handled gracefully.\n* Synchronization of blocks from object storage is now resilient to corrupted local cache entries, handling them gracefully instead of failing.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "level=debug ts=2019-12-11T19:42:56.423840267Z caller=main.go:101 msg=\"maxprocs: Updating GOMAXPROCS=[1]: using minimum allowed GOMAXPROCS\"\nlevel=info ts=2019-12-11T19:42:56.424073196Z caller=main.go:149 msg=\"Tracing will be disabled\"\nlevel=info ts=2019-12-11T19:42:56.424156986Z caller=factory.go:43 msg=\"loading bucket configuration\"\nlevel=info ts=2019-12-11T19:42:56.620788641Z caller=cache.go:172 msg=\"created index cache\" maxItemSizeBytes=131072000 maxSizeBytes=262144000 maxItems=math.MaxInt64\nlevel=info ts=2019-12-11T19:42:56.621005242Z caller=options.go:20 protocol=gRPC msg=\"disabled TLS, key and cert must be set to enable\"\nlevel=info ts=2019-12-11T19:42:56.621309084Z caller=store.go:261 msg=\"starting store node\"\nlevel=info ts=2019-12-11T19:42:56.621513052Z caller=prober.go:127 msg=\"chan"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "thanos",
+      "incubating",
+      "observability",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "thanos"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/issues/1874",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/1936"
+    },
+    "reactions": 6,
+    "comments": 10,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl",
+      "thanos"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with Thanos deployed (sidecar, query, store gateway, compactor as needed). The thanos binary provides subcommands for each component."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:27:34.992Z",
